title: FLOSS Weekly 488: Keycloak
summary:
Keycloak is an open source Identity and Access Management solution aimed at modern applications and services. Stian Thorgersen is one of the two founders of Keycloak and is currently the project lead. Sébastien Blanc is part of the Keycloak team. Besides his engineering tasks he is also the "Keycloak Evangelist" and travels the world to speak about Keycloak at conferences (FOSDEM, Devoxx, JavaOne etc ...).
Download or subscribe to this show at https://twit.tv/shows/floss-weekly
Here's what's coming up for FLOSS in the future.
Think your open source project should be on FLOSS Weekly? Email Randal at merlyn@stonehenge.com
